narrative:
Hillsboro municipal court district has 23,464 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -13.6% D−R vs -33.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
